name: The Vertex
description: Modern high-rise 1-bedroom apartment in the heart of Downtown. Features floor-to-ceiling windows, stainless steel appliances, and a smart home thermostat. Building amenities include a rooftop pool, a 24/7 fitness center, and a pet washing station. Perfect for young professionals.

name: Oakwood Townhomes
description: Spacious 3-bedroom family townhome located in a quiet suburban neighborhood. Includes a private fenced backyard, an attached two-car garage, and in-unit washer and dryer. Community features a playground and is walking distance to top-rated schools. Pets are welcome with no breed restrictions.

name: Echo Lofts
description: Industrial-style studio loft in the vibrant Arts District. Features exposed brick walls, polished concrete floors, and soaring 14-foot ceilings. Steps away from local coffee shops, galleries, and public transit. No pets allowed. Ideal for minimalist urban living.

name: Riverside Oasis
description: Luxury 2-bedroom waterfront condo with panoramic river views. Premium finishes throughout, including quartz countertops, a wine fridge, and hardwood floors. Includes valet parking, a dedicated concierge desk, and a private balcony. Highly exclusive building.
